scripts.mailpit:start:
(docker info > /dev/null 2>&1 || (echo '❌ Docker is not running. Please start Docker/OrbStack first.' && exit 1)) && (docker-compose -f mailpit/docker-compose.yml up -d mailpit 2>&1 | grep -v 'is up-to-date\|Starting\|Creating' || true) && echo '✅ Mailpit started!
📧 SMTP: smtp://127.0.0.1:1025
🌐 Web UI: http://localhost:8025'
scripts.mailpit:stop: (docker info > /dev/null 2>&1 || (echo '❌ Docker is not running. Please start Docker/OrbStack first.' && exit 1)) && docker stop mailpit > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '✅ Mailpit stopped' || echo '❌ Mailpit is not running'
scripts.mailpit:restart:
(docker info > /dev/null 2>&1 || (echo '❌ Docker is not running. Please start Docker/OrbStack first.' && exit 1)) && docker stop mailpit > /dev/null 2>&1 && docker rm mailpit > /dev/null 2>&1 && docker-compose -f mailpit/docker-compose.yml up -d mailpit 2>&1 | grep -v 'is up-to-date\|Starting\|Creating' || true && echo '✅ Mailpit restarted (fresh)!
📧 SMTP: smtp://127.0.0.1:1025
🌐 Web UI: http://localhost:8025' || echo '❌ Failed to restart Mailpit'
